title: Good write-through with degradation and TTL safety net
expected_feedback: No violations. Correct write-through pattern: (1) DB is source of truth, written first, (2) cache updated synchronously with TTL safety net, (3) on cache write failure, key is invalidated (DEL) rather than leaving stale data, (4) TTL with jitter even on write-through as defense against edge-case drift, (5) logging for observability of cache failures.
